skills.name: winning-ad
skills.description: Strategic workflow for creating high-converting social media ads on Arcads. Use proactively when a user asks to generate, create, produce, or make any image or video for advertising, marketing, or brand content.

skills.name: spy-competitor-ads
skills.description: Research and download the top 5 highest-performing competitor video ads from the Meta Ad Library, ranked by total views/impressions. Use when a user wants to spy on competitors, find winning ads, research what's working in their category, or build a swipe file.
